themes: Multi-location managers are the dominant audience and have been waiting an average of well over 100 days, signaling a systemic gap in Product's engagement cadence with this critical user segment.

Several large enterprise and franchise accounts — including Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Ford, Holiday Inn Express, and Anytime Fitness — appear multiple times, suggesting unresolved or evolving product needs that span teams within the same organization.

Administrator-level contacts, though fewer in number, represent portfolio-scale customers where SOCi's ability to demonstrate cross-location governance, consistency, and measurable ROI is the highest-stakes conversation to get right.
